summary: TWO_COLUMN: Givens rotation in (1, 2)-plane of ℝ³ embedding. LEFT NumberPlane with GREEN v=(3, 4) arrow rotating via ValueTracker theta_tr → (5, 0) target; GREY radius-5 arc + YELLOW trail via always_redraw. RIGHT shows 3×3 G(θ) matrix rebuilt per frame + live θ, v_y (→ 0), |v| (constant 5).
